title: ¡A mí la Legión!
writer: Raúl Cancio, Jaime García Herranz, Luis Lucia
actors: Alfredo Mayo, Luis Peña, Manuel Luna
plot: In North Africa, in a detachment of the Legion (the 4th Flag), El Grajo ('the Rook'), the most courageous legionnaire, and Mauro, who have just joined, become close friends. Mauro, from whom only the name is known, gives the impre...
